title: Flaky Fresh Italian Veal Saltimbocca
description: Quick and savory Italian dish, featuring veal, ham, and fresh parsley. Typically served as a main course.

ingredients.name: White wine
ingredients.notes: dry white wine, not fortified or sweet

instructions: Season the veal cutlets with salt and black pepper on both sides.
Dredge the veal cutlets in flour, shaking off excess.
Dip the floured veal cutlets in butter, then coat with breadcrumbs.
In a large skillet, cook the veal cutlets over medium heat for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Add prosciutto slices to the skillet and cook for 1-2 minutes on each side, or until crispy.
Add white wine to the skillet and cook until reduced by half.
Add fresh parsley to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, or until wilted.
Garnish the veal cutlets with parsley and serve hot.
Nutrition information will vary based on specific ingredients used, but this recipe is approximately 350 calories per serving.
